title: Pradhan Mantri Kisan Samman Nidhi (PM-KISAN)
description: Pradhan Mantri Kisan Samman Nidhi (PM-KISAN) is a central sector scheme aimed at providing financial income support to small and marginal farmers across India. The scheme ensures that eligible farmers receive direct income assistance to support agricultural expenses such as seeds, fertilizers, and other farming inputs through Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT).
ministry: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare

states: Dadra and Nagar Haveli and Daman and Diu

benefits: Financial assistance of ₹6000 per year provided in three equal installments.
Direct Benefit Transfer ensures funds reach beneficiaries without intermediaries.
Supports purchase of seeds, fertilizers, and farming inputs.
Provides income stability to small and marginal farmers.

instructions: Login using Aadhaar or mobile number
Check beneficiary status in dashboard

title: Ayushman Bharat - Pradhan Mantri Jan Arogya Yojana (PM-JAY)
description: Ayushman Bharat PM-JAY is a national health insurance scheme providing financial protection to economically weaker families. It enables cashless treatment for secondary and tertiary healthcare services at empaneled hospitals across India.
ministry: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare

states: Dadra and Nagar Haveli and Daman and Diu

benefits: Health insurance coverage up to ₹5 lakh per family annually.
Cashless hospitalization at empaneled hospitals.
Coverage includes surgeries, diagnostics, and medicines.
Reduces financial burden of medical emergencies.

instructions: Check eligibility online
Download Ayushman card
